overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through an outlaw camp in a forested area during golden hour. The character approaches a wooden shack, briefly enters it, then continues exploring the camp with various NPCs, animals, and rustic structures visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: outlaw camp clearing with wooden butcher shack

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through grassy camp area toward a wooden shack with hanging meat

entered.detail: wooden shack with weathered red paint and animal pelts hanging outside
rough wooden fence lining the camp path
large fallen tree trunk across the grass
small wooden structure in the background
white chickens pecking at the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a grassy clearing in the outlaw camp, approaching a wooden butcher shack on the right. Chickens peck at the ground near a wooden fence on the left, while tall trees cast long shadows in the golden afternoon light.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden porch of butcher shack with hanging meat

events.description: character opens wooden door and steps inside the shack briefly
character exits the shack and turns around to face the camp

agents.ego_description: walking up wooden steps, entering the butcher shack door, then exiting and turning to survey the camp

notable_agents.action: elderly person sitting in a chair on the porch

entered.detail: wooden deck with roof overhead providing shade
animal carcasses and pelts hanging from the porch roof

segments.scene_description: The character ascends wooden steps onto the shaded porch of the butcher shack, where meat hangs from the roof beams. After briefly entering the dark interior through a wooden door, the character exits and turns, revealing an elderly camp member seated nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: central camp area with dirt paths and scattered NPCs

events.description: character steps off wooden porch back onto ground level

agents.ego_description: walking down from the porch and through the central camp area past various camp members

notable_agents.action: man sitting on the ground near a wooden fence

entered.detail: muddy dirt trail through the camp
old wooden wagon with canvas cover

segments.scene_description: Leaving the porch behind, the character walks along a muddy dirt path through the heart of the camp. A white pig grazes on the left while camp members sit and stand near wooden structures, and an old wagon sits parked along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pavilion area near the water's edge

agents.ego_description: walking past the main gathering pavilion where several camp members are congregated

notable_agents.action: group of camp members standing near the pavilion

entered.detail: large open-sided wooden structure with canvas roof
calm water visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the dirt path past a large wooden pavilion where camp members gather. Wooden barrels line the right side of the path, while glimpses of calm lake water appear through the trees on the left as the camp opens toward the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: hunting camp area with skinning rack and hanging game

events.description: character slows and stops near the skinning rack

agents.ego_description: approaching the skinning rack at the edge of camp where animal carcasses are hung

notable_agents.action: camp member working near the hanging carcasses

entered.detail: wooden frame with poles for hanging animal carcasses
dead animals and pelts hanging from the rack
rough wooden bench near the rack

segments.scene_description: Approaching the edge of camp, the character walks toward a wooden skinning rack where animal carcasses hang in the golden light. The sun filters through the trees from behind, illuminating the lake shore visible to the left, while a camp member works near the hanging game.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic outlaw camp that transitions from a sheltered forest clearing to an open, sun-drenched waterfront. It begins in a grassy area where chickens peck near a fence, moving toward a wooden butcher shack as long shadows stretch across the ground in the golden afternoon light. As the camera ascends the porch and briefly enters the dark interior of the shack, the scene shifts back outside to reveal an elderly camp member before following a muddy path through the heart of the settlement. The movement then expands past grazing pigs, parked wagons, and a large wooden pavilion where camp members gather, with glimpses of calm lake water appearing through the trees. Finally, the camera reaches the camp's edge, passing wooden barrels and a skinning rack where animal carcasses hang, as the sun filters through the foliage to illuminate the lake shore.
